description:
Mario Sports Mix is a fast-paced Wii sports game that includes basketball, volleyball, dodgeball, and hockey.
Play as characters from the Mario, Final Fantasy and Dragon Quest franchise in order to defeat the evil in this
land and conquer all the sports!

v0.0.1-h1.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP v.0.0.1 Hotfix

## What's changed?:
- Normal Cups are now forcibly made
- You can select if you want Hard Cups on or off
- Fixed Behemoth King region not getting created when goal is Defeat Behemoth

### GECKO CODES HAVE NOT CHANGED, I WILL STATE IF THEY HAVE
v0.0.1-h1.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v.0.0.1 Hotfix

v0.1.0.description:
# What's changed?
- Full NTSC-U support!
- Added Deathlink
- Fixed commands + added new ones
- Automatic game region detection
- Gecko codes are no longer required, they are applied in the client
- Changed common addresses to use cached values
- Fixed ?-Panel replacement
- More stuff I forgot
v0.1.0.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0

v0.1.0-beta.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta
## What's changed?
- Testing NTSC-U support
- Fixed Filler items and /item command

## If using NTSC-U, please enable 3 random characters in your yaml, things **may and will** break if not as the gecko codes currently are only for PAL

v0.3.0.description:
# THIS RELEASE WILL NOT WORK WITH ANY PRIOR RELEASE

# What's Changed?
- Added Character Sanity (Characters, or characters + costumes)
- Added Location Groups
- Added Item Groups
- Renamed MOST of the items, fixed all the bugs to do with those (Eg, Character: Mario -> Mario)
- Fixed items getting replaced sometimes
- Fixed tournaments being ready to handle for a brief moment
- Behemoth HP now increases if sent a deathlink during Boss Battle
- Added deathlink logic for dodgeball (Works differently than everything else)
- Fixed Behemoth Rule


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ElectroStarz/ArchipelagoMSM/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0
v0.3.0.title: Mario Sports Mix v0.3.0

v1.0.0.description:
# Mario Sports Mix v1.0.0 - Customisation Update!
## What's Changed?
<sub>Before anyone yells at me we're working on making ?-Panel replacement more reliable, thank you for your patience :]</sub>

## Fixed
* Fixed functions that didn't work in NTSC-U
* Reworked Sports Mix unlock through Sports Crystals
* Hopefully fixed the annoying client bug!
## Replaced
* Instead of using persistent storage, switched to using AP Data Storage to keep track of used filler & traps
## Options 
* Added custom tournament settings for each sport (Custom period/set amount, custom timer, points to win, etc)
Note: These settings WILL be applied in Sports Mix!
If you have any more suggestions, please tell me!
* Added Court Unlock Type (Court items or progressive court)
* Added Cup Unlock Type (Cup items or progressive cups)
* Added Win Cups Goal option
## Items
* Added exhibition difficulty items (Easy, Normal, Hard, Expert - Should make sphere 1 smaller!)
* Added progressive courts
* Added progressive cups
## Traps
* Added Fast Trap (x3 game speed for 5 seconds)
* Added Slow Trap (x0.5 game speed for 5 seconds)
* Added Teleport Trap (Teleports character to random spot)
## Locations
Changed "Play as [character]" to "Win as [character]"
## Rules
* Fixed rules to do with cups
* Added new rules for the new items
* Added new rules for exhibition locations
## QoL Updates
* When beating an exhibition match, difficulty locations below the current difficulty that are enabled and unlocked will also send
v1.0.0.title: Mario Sports Mix v1.0.0 - Customisation Update

v2.0.0.description:
# What's Changed?
## Major Changes
* Added Party Mode items, locations, rules, etc

## Goals
* Added Exhibition Tour
* Added Party Palooza

## Generation
* Added itempool overflow protection (Removes already placed filler items (costumes) if better items need to be placed)
This does NOT fully fix fill errors. If you find any, please do ping me and I will fix them asap!

## Options
* Players can now choose between all sports or universal exhibition locations
* Added Start Inventory from Pool

## Locations
* Added Court Sanity (Winning on a court sends a check)
* Added Special Sanity (Using a character's special sends a check)

## Items
* Added Special Meter Charge Filler (Converted to 1 Super Star if you don't have the Special Meter)
* The lowest Exhibition difficulty enabled will be given upon connection

## Fixes
* Fixed the tournament not being recognised when disconnecting during a tournament match (Will not work when exiting the client)
* Added multiple save support

## Minor Changes
* Added UT Support + Yaml-less generation
* Added the client version to the UI title
v2.0.0.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v2.0.0 - Party Mode!
